This modern three-bedroom duplex offers a rare combination of style, comfort and practicality, making it an exceptional opportunity for families, professionals, or anyone seeking a thoughtfully designed home in a peaceful yet well connected location.Arranged over two levels, the property is bright, airy, and intelligently laid out to support real-life living.
